title: Guidance Engine routing
summary: Forge Method now routes substantive human intent through a native Guidance Engine, workflow catalog metadata, human facilitation packs, and specialized guided-depth workflows before following stale state actions.
highlights: guide --question --json classifies corrections, confusion, brainstorm, research, game, quality, builder, and mechanical build intent.
Workflow catalog metadata now validates phase, required status, outputs, aliases, and facilitation pack references.
Human facilitation packs add richer guided conversation for the core workflows without bloating compact agent state machines.
Guided-depth workflows cover game lifecycle, test architecture, builder analysis/conversion, and document utility requests.
Guided-depth catalog entries can now reference validated artifact templates.
Narrow guided-depth routes now return transition commands and facilitation packs include domain examples.
Testing education requests route to teach-testing before strategy/framework selection.
Hot Start now runs Guidance Engine after resume when the user message contains substantive intent.
Emergency reload remains included for stale chat recovery.
